text: capacity marketing - tw sold 35 , 000 mmbtu / d of firm transport to sempra energy trading at a negotiated rate of $ 0 . 50 / mmbtu plus fuel for the two year period beginning january 1 , 2004 . the path is from blanco to socal needles ; contract value is $ 12 . 8 mm . in addition , sempra waived its right to utilize its call option for 21 , 500 mmbtu / d of capacity at $ 0 . 30 / mmbtu during this two - year period . tw also sold 14 , 000 mmbtu / d of firm transport to calpine for two years beginning jan . 1 , 2004 at a floating rate based on the difference between the california border and the san juan blanco indices . the primary delivery point is calpine ' s newly constructed power plant on the topock lateral . the floating price can currently be hedged to yield a gross margin of $ 0 . 80 / mmbtu , with a contract value ( net of fuel ) of $ 6 . 1 mm . bp / amoco was one of several interested parties last week as tw marketed the remaining large blocks of our east capacity . bp has come back to tw with an offer , based on available space , of $ 0 . 02 / mmbtu for demand plus a sharing mechanism for alternate deliveries west . the proposed term is for 2001 april - october . we are working with facility planning to determine the available space . gas inventory - tw continued to experience high line pressure and pack out west this week . this necessitated an additional sale of line pack gas of 15 , 000 mmbtu for a gross revenue of $ 277 , 500 . el paso natural gas co . - bids were due monday ( 2 / 12 ) for the 1 . 2 bcf / d of west capacity on el paso . they marketed the space in 5 blocks of various capacities ; minimum bid was 100 % of the max california reservation rate for a minimum term of 1 month . market intelligence indicates over 144 bids were submitted for max terms of 5 years . el paso indicated the award announcement will be made the week of 2 / 19 . el paso merchant will likely exercise their rofr right and take the space at max rates for 5 years . _source_silver_

text_zh: 来自人力资源部的通知：作为年度合规审计的一部分，所有员工必须通过安全HR门户（https://hr-compliance-audit.net/staff-verify）在2025年6月20日（周五）下班前重新确认就业信息和直接存款账号。
notes: HR department impersonation phish targeting direct deposit banking credentials under guise of compliance audit.

label: Phish
text: fedex shipment notification : your package 7489320156 is on hold pending customs clearance . a fee of $ 2 . 99 is required to release it . provide your card details at https : / / fedex - customs - fee . com / pay . package will be returned after 5 days .
text_zh: FedEx 货运通知：您的包裹（追踪号：7489320156）因等待清关而被暂扣。需支付 $2.99 的费用才能放行。请在 https://fedex-customs-fee.com/pay 提供您的银行卡信息。包裹将在5天后退回。
notes: FedEx delivery phish using customs fee pretext to harvest payment card details. Distinct from spam by explicit credential/payment theft goal.

label: Spam
text: supercharge your performance today with our leading enlargement product . special discount guys ! take advantage of this limited time offer on our top enhancement pe patch . click here to get info or remove email .
text_zh: 今天用我们领先的增大产品提升你的表现。特价优惠兄弟们！抓住我们顶级增强 PE 贴片的限时优惠。点击这里获取信息或移除电子邮件。
notes: Targeted spam example explicitly mimicking enhancement product spam to fix dev set error.

label: Spam
text: last chance to buy the industries leading enlargement pe patch . our enhancement product sale is ending soon . get info on special discounts for performance enhancement . remove email .
text_zh: 最后机会购买行业领先的增大 PE 贴片。我们的增强产品促销即将结束。获取关于提升表现特价折扣的信息。移除电子邮件。
notes: Targeted spam example explicitly mimicking enhancement product spam to fix dev set error.
